failures.description: The agent invoked ProductCatalogSearch with malformed arguments: it omitted the required string item_id and used product_id 0 instead of the provided string product_id "1762337868".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The required information was already available at index 1: item_id "1345513440" and product_id "1762337868". At index 2, the Researcher prepared ProductCatalogSearch with tool_args {"product_id": 0}, omitting the required item_id and using an integer/value not grounded in the task. The tool then explicitly rejected this as a SchemaError at index 3. This is primarily an ill-formed tool invocation, not a system/connectivity issue or guardrail block.
